task_completion.description: The agent accessed the Odoo Calendar application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Alice Johnson is removed from the 'Team Standup' event attendees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Team Standup' event details or edit screen is open, and Alice Johnson is no longer listed in the attendees field, while other attendees remain.

task_completion.description: The 'Q2 Financial Review' event is rescheduled to the following Friday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Q2 Financial Review' event details or edit screen shows the date changed to the following Friday, or the event is seen dragged/placed on the calendar for the following Friday.

task_completion.description: The 'One-on-One with Mentor' event is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation prompt for deleting the 'One-on-One with Mentor' event is accepted, or the calendar view for next Monday shows that the event is no longer present at 2:00 PM.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent's actions (clicks, typing) occur within the web browser displaying Odoo.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the events in the Odoo interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking edit, changing attendees/dates, and clicking delete within the Odoo Calendar UI, rather than just typing the expected outcome in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete or modify other unrelated events on the calendar.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other events on the calendar remain unchanged and visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Person: Alice Johnson. Event 1: 'Team Standup' (originally next Monday 9:00 AM). Event 2: 'Q2 Financial Review' (originally next Monday 10:00 AM). Event 3: 'One-on-One with Mentor' (originally next Monday 2:00 PM). The task requires removing Alice from Event 1, rescheduling Event 2 to the following Friday, and deleting Event 3.
